ddls:
CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being evaluated */,
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the presentation being evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation took place */,
  "internship_site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the internship site where the presentation was given */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., presentation, internship report) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_internship_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("internship_site_id") REFERENCES internship_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_presentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("presentation_id") REFERENCES presentations ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion (e.g., Attire, Oral Communication, Organization) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the criterion in the overall evaluation */,
  "scoring_scale" TEXT /* Description of the scoring scale (e.g., 0-3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the score belongs to */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion the score is for */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given (e.g., 0, 1, 2, 3) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the evaluator */,
  "evaluator_feedback" TEXT /* Detailed feedback provided by the evaluator */,
  "student_response" TEXT /* Student's response to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES evaluation_criteria ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presentations" (
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presentation */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who gave the presentation */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the presentation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the presentation took place */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the presentation file */,
  "internship_site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the internship site related to the presentation */,
  "presentation_type" TEXT /* Type of presentation (e.g., individual, group) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the presentation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the presentation was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presentations_internship_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("internship_site_id") REFERENCES internship_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presentations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internship_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the internship site */,
  "mission" TEXT /* Mission of the site */,
  "services" TEXT /* Services provided by the site */,
  "personnel" TEXT /* Personnel at the site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the internship site */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internship_responsibilities" (
  "responsibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each responsibility */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site the responsibility belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the responsibility */,
  "responsibility_type" TEXT /* Type of responsibility (e.g., project management, data analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("responsibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internship_responsibilities_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES internship_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the evaluator (e.g., faculty, staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the evaluator */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the evaluator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the student is enrolled in */,
  "cohort" TEXT /* Cohort or batch of the student */,
  "internship_site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the internship site the student is associated with */,
  "internship_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the internship */,
  "internship_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the internship */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., active, graduated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_internship_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("internship_site_id") REFERENCES internship_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the result belongs to */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the evaluator */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score for the evaluation */,
  "final_comments" TEXT /* Final comments provided by the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., presentation, internship report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, evaluator, student) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
